name: ADR superseding chain validator ensures a superseding ADR points to a previously existing ADR id
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 First
' > docs/adr/0001-first.md && printf '# 0002 Second
supersedes: 0001
' > docs/adr/0002-second.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-supersedes.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_supersedes_valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
